Years of Excellence in Essex

Our Story

Crafted with Passion,
Served with Soul

Array Brasserie & Grill was born from a singular vision — to bring world-class Mediterranean flavours to the heart of Essex, paired with a dining atmosphere that feels both intimate and grand.

From sunrise brunches to sunset dinners, every dish celebrates carefully sourced ingredients and culinary artistry. We don’t just feed you — we create moments you carry with you.

Discover Our Story

Chef’s Selection

Signature Dishes

Each plate tells a story — of heritage, craft, and the finest ingredients from land and sea.

Prime Ribeye
28-day aged prime ribeye, smoked on the pass, creamed spinach & truffle fries.
£48
Braised Lamb Shank
Slow-braised lamb shank, silky mash, roasted cherry tomato & red wine jus.
£32
Miso Glazed Chicken
Miso & honey glazed supreme chicken, cucumber ribbons, pickled radish & ponzu.

Al Fresco Dining

Our Garden
Terrace

Step into our stunning covered terrace — an all-season sanctuary of living walls, blossom trees and open skies. Whether you’re brunch-ing under the morning sun or dining beneath the stars, the garden is Essex’s most beautiful outdoor dining space.

Retractable roof, climate-controlled heating, and surrounded by lush tropical planting year-round.

Book the Terrace

The Array Experience

More Than a Meal.
A Memory.

From the moment you arrive, every detail is considered — the candlelight, the music, the perfectly timed service. This is dining elevated.

Read Our Reviews

Guest Reviews

What Our Guests Say

★★★★★

If you are looking for a classy and fun place to visit, this is your place. Visited for my daughter’s birthday and she was very happy. Stunning food and drinks and the decor is beautiful. Will return.

C
Claire G.
Google Review
★★★★★

The atmosphere, ambiance, and staff’s attentiveness were absolutely amazing. I had the mixed shish and the taste was simply legendary. I will definitely be coming back — highly recommend.

L
L. Pianist
Google Review
★★★★★

Interior decor is very beautiful with a lovely ambiance. All food had amazing flavour — the starters especially. Drinks were lovely and dessert was a gorgeous surprise. Highly recommend!

N
N. Rafiq
